name: 智能告警修复-泰国-统一平台模板

parameters.command: =ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.20.236 'if [ ! -d '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' ]; then git clone '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; fi && cd '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && APP_COUNTRY='"'"'th'"'"' APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' DS_API_GET_TIMEOUT_SECONDS='"'"'3'"'"' DS_API_RETRY_COUNT='"'"'1'"'"' DS_STEP2_PROGRESS_EVERY='"'"'5'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'th'"'"' REPAIR_WORKFLOW_CONFLICT_WAIT_SECONDS='"'"'300'"'"' LOCK_DIR='"'"'/tmp/intelligent_alarm_repair_th.lockdir'"'"'; if ! mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then echo '"'"'已有智能修复任务运行中，跳过本次执行'"'"'; exit 0; fi; trap "rmdir \"$LOCK_DIR\"" EXIT; python3 core/repair_strict_7step.py'

ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.20.236 'if [ ! -d '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' ]; then git clone '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; fi && cd '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' && git remote set-url origin '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' && git fetch origin master && git reset --hard origin/master && git log -1 --oneline'
